## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for the file explorer. Registers the /files app entry and defines FileExplorer.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `FileExplorer`
- Contributes:
  - `Apps.App` → `FileExplorerLayout`
